description_long: This is a compact, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a wood-paneled exterior. The front facade features large sliding glass doors on the ground floor and a wide window above, allowing for ample natural light. Vertical wooden slats on the upper level add architectural interest and partial privacy to a small balcony or terrace area. The side and rear elevations have a mix of narrow vertical windows and solid wood paneling, with minimal ornamentation. The roof area appears partially open, possibly for a rooftop terrace or garden. The overall design is clean, geometric, and emphasizes horizontal and vertical lines.
description: A modern, two-story house with wood paneling, large glass doors, and vertical slat accents, featuring a flat roof and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing large sliding glass doors, a wide upper window, and vertical wooden slats on the upper right.
description_view_1: Side view with a single narrow vertical window and continuous wood paneling, minimal architectural features.
description_view_2: Rear view with a tall vertical window, some horizontal black accents, and a partial view of the rooftop slats.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two small windows and a clear view of the rooftop terrace area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a large sliding glass door with no visible steps or porch, emphasizing a minimalist, open design.
